title: Modded Ores Borders
description: This adds many ore borders for many popular mods, i will actively update this with submissions to my dms on discord "cherop"
body:
I do not provide the Vanilla ores because [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs) already does an amazing job with those.

## YOU CAN USE THIS IN YOUR OWN MODPACK PUBLIC OR PRIVATE I DONT CARE

## Currently supported mods (not finale)
- Alex's Caves
- Blue Skies
- Born in Chaos
- Create
- Create Dream & Desires (old versions only) 
- Create New Age
- Deeper And Darker
- Gobber 2
- [Let's Do] Meadow (Coming 1.1 Update)
- Mekanism 

### Gobber2 Ore has animated textures.
